hero.title: Manage your bookings. Get more clients.
hero.description: Simplify your scheduling, avoid missed appointments, and automate your business. Gymio helps you focus on what really matters: your clients.

items.title: Book in 2 clicks
items.description: A smooth interface designed for your clients. Booking a session has never been so fast and easy.

items.title: Online 24/7
items.description: Your business stays accessible even while you sleep. Clients can book anytime.

items.title: Integrated payments
items.description: Get paid at booking. Simple, fast and secure to avoid missed payments.

items.title: Cancellation management
items.description: Give your clients flexibility. They can cancel or reschedule easily.

items.title: Custom booking page
items.description: Create a booking page that reflects your brand.

items.title: Free updates
items.description: Gymio improves every week with new features at no extra cost.

promotion.title: Unlock your potential, grow your business
promotion.description: Automate your bookings and focus on what truly matters: your clients and your growth.

rows.title: Create your booking page in minutes
rows.description: Set up your services, availability, and profile in just a few clicks. Gymio lets you launch your booking system quickly, with no technical skills needed.
items: Set your schedule and availability easily
Customize your booking page to match your brand

rows.title: Let your clients book automatically
rows.description: No more endless WhatsApp messages. Your clients can book their sessions online, anytime, in just a few seconds.

rows.title: Manage and grow your business

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know to get started with Gymio.

items.a: Gymio allows your clients to book sessions online in just a few clicks based on your availability.

items.q: Do my clients need to create an account?
items.a: No, your clients can book quickly without creating an account.
Yes, you can set your schedule, block time slots, and manage your calendar easily.
Yes, automatic reminders are sent to reduce no-shows.
Yes, you can cancel anytime with no commitment.
Yes, Gymio is designed to be simple and quick to use.
